name: Workflow C — ClickUp ↔ GHL Contact ID Backfill (Churchill Memorials)

nodes.name: Daily 07:00 (Europe/London)
nodes.notes: Runs once a day at 07:00 Europe/London — one hour before Workflow B so GHL IDs are populated before follow-ups go out. Also runnable manually via 'Execute Workflow'.

nodes.name: ClickUp — Get All Tasks
nodes.notes: Pulls every task in list 901207633256 regardless of status. Custom fields are included so we can read the email and existing GHL Contact ID.

nodes.name: Loop Over Tasks
nodes.notes: One task at a time so each branch has clean per-task context. Output 0 = done, output 1 = loop.

nodes.name: Extract Email & GHL ID
nodes.notes: Reads the email and current GHL Contact ID custom fields off the task and decides whether this task needs processing.

nodes.name: IF — Needs GHL lookup?
nodes.notes: true → look up GHL contact. false → skip this task (already linked, or no email).

nodes.name: GHL — Search Contacts by Email
nodes.notes: Uses GHL's contacts list endpoint with query=<email>. The response is filtered by exact-email match in the next Code node — the API treats query as a fuzzy text search.

nodes.name: Pick Exact-Email Match
nodes.notes: Filters the GHL search response down to exact email matches and picks the first. Flags multipleMatches so that gets logged downstream.

nodes.name: IF — Found GHL Contact?
nodes.notes: true → write the GHL ID into the ClickUp custom field. false → post a 'no match' comment for human review.

nodes.name: ClickUp — Set GHL Contact ID
nodes.notes: Writes the discovered GHL contact ID into the ClickUp custom field cd9f064c-c9d0-4bd2-976c-86e41a86350c on the current task.

parameters.commentText: =🔗 GHL contact linked — {{ $json.ghlContactName || $json.email }} ({{ $json.ghlContactId }}){{ $json.multipleMatches ? `\n⚠️ ${$json.matchCount} GHL contacts matched this email — first one was chosen, please verify` : '' }}

nodes.name: ClickUp — Log Link
nodes.notes: Confirmation comment so the audit trail shows which GHL contact was linked. Also flags ambiguous multi-match cases.

parameters.commentText: =⚠️ No GHL contact found for {{ $json.email }} — please add one in GHL or correct the email on this task

nodes.name: ClickUp — Log No Match
nodes.notes: Posted when GHL has no contact matching this task's email so the team knows to fix it.
